name: @tsuuanmi/pi
description: Coding agent CLI with read, bash, edit, write tools and session management

scripts.build: tsgo -p tsconfig.build.json && shx chmod +x dist/cli.js && npm run copy-assets
scripts.build:binary: npm --prefix ../tui run build && npm --prefix ../ai run build && npm --prefix ../agent run build && npm run build && bun build --compile ./dist/cli/bun/cli.js --outfile dist/pi && npm run copy-binary-assets
scripts.copy-assets: shx mkdir -p dist/packages/lsp dist/packages/mcp && shx mkdir -p dist/packages/workflows && shx cp -r ../workflows/dist/* dist/packages/workflows/ && node scripts/write-bundled-package-manifests.mjs && shx mkdir -p dist/packages/workflows/skills/deep-interview dist/packages/workflows/skills/ralplan dist/packages/workflows/skills/team dist/packages/workflows/skills/ultragoal && shx cp ../workflows/src/skills/deep-interview/SKILL.md dist/packages/workflows/skills/deep-interview/ && shx cp ../workflows/src/skills/ralplan/SKILL.md dist/packages/workflows/skills/ralplan/ && shx cp ../workflows/src/skills/team/SKILL.md dist/packages/workflows/skills/team/ && shx cp ../workflows/src/skills/ultragoal/SKILL.md dist/packages/workflows/skills/ultragoal/ && shx mkdir -p dist/packages/workflows/agents && shx cp ../workflows/src/agents/*.md dist/packages/workflows/agents/
scripts.copy-binary-assets: shx cp package.json dist/ && shx cp README.md dist/ && shx cp CHANGELOG.md dist/ && shx mkdir -p dist/theme && shx cp ../tui/src/theme/*.json dist/theme/ && shx mkdir -p dist/packages/lsp dist/packages/mcp && shx cp -r src/packages/lsp/* dist/packages/lsp/ && shx cp -r src/packages/mcp/* dist/packages/mcp/ && shx mkdir -p dist/packages/workflows && shx cp -r ../workflows/dist/* dist/packages/workflows/ && node scripts/write-bundled-package-manifests.mjs workflows && shx cp -r docs dist/
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run shrinkwrap

author: Superman
